membership_no.text: ทะเบียนผู้กู้

as_name.default: นางชุติมา พุ่มบุบผา

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.coop_position, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount) as thai_money_amount, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.period, '!as_name_1!' as ass_name, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_description, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount) as thai_loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount) as thai_period_payment_amount, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code, pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month,'LT') as receive_month_thai, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as tdate_due, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_rep_kep_return_month.book_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as book_date_tdate, ( select td_share.money_amount from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det td_share where td_share.keeping_type_code ='MS00' and td_share.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and td_share.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and td_share.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no ) as share_return_amount, (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det, sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_rep_kep_return_month
WHERE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month AND sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = trim( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_description ) AND sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type AND sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_status = '2' AND sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code in ( '02' , '03' ) AND sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no in ( select distinct loan_contract_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) and sc_rep_kep_return_month.rep_type = 'BOK'
/*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = 2016 ) --and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = 1 ) --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '077602') order by sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
